summary: MS2DeepScore can predict Tanimoto scores between 0.1 and 0.9 with a RMSE between 0.13 and 0.2.

MS2DeepScore achieves a root mean squared error for predicted Tanimoto scores of about 0.15 when run without uncertainty restrictions. MS2DeepScore achieves a root mean squared error down to 0.1 with stronger restrictions on model uncertain
With IQR threshold less than 0.025, the average RMSE drops from about 0.17 to about 0.11.
The dropout rate used in the neural network is 0.2.
For Monte-Carlo Dropout ensembles, N=10 embeddings were created from networks with dropout enabled.
